commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n efa-validation -o wide | grep baseline'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n efa-validation sglang-baseline-9dbf4b857-dn2qt --tail=50 2>&1 | tail -50'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio describe pod sglang-baseline-9dbf4b857-dn2qt -n efa-validation 2>&1 | tail -30'
